http_loadbalancer.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: http_loadbalancer
metadata:
  name: example-app
  namespace: default
spec:
  domains:
    - example.com
  https_auto_cert:
    port: 443
    tls_config:
      default_security: {}
  advertise_on_public_default_vip: {}
  routes:
    - prefix: "/"
      origin_pool:
        pool_name: backend-pool

origin_pool.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: origin_pool
metadata:
  name: backend-pool
  namespace: default
spec:
  origin_servers:
    - public_name:
        dns_name: backend1.example.com
    - public_name:
        dns_name: backend2.example.com
  port: 8080

tcp_loadbalancer.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: tcp_loadbalancer
metadata:
  name: database-lb
  namespace: default
spec:
  listener:
    port: 5432
    protocol: "TCP"
  origin_pools:
    - pool_name: postgres-cluster
  advertise:
    - public_ip: true

healthcheck.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: healthcheck
metadata:
  name: http-health
  namespace: default
spec:
  http_health_check:
    path: /health
    use_origin_server_name: {}
  interval: 15
  timeout: 3
  unhealthy_threshold: 1
  healthy_threshold: 3
  jitter_percent: 30

app_firewall.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: app_firewall
metadata:
  name: default-waf
  namespace: default
spec:
  blocking: {}

service_policy.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: service_policy
metadata:
  name: allow-all
  namespace: default
spec:
  allow_all_requests: {}

certificate.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: certificate
metadata:
  name: example-cert
  namespace: default
spec:
  certificate_url: "string:///BASE64_ENCODED_CERTIFICATE"
  private_key:
    clear_secret_info:
      url: "string:///BASE64_ENCODED_PRIVATE_KEY"
      provider: ""

api_definition.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: api_definition
metadata:
  name: example-api
  namespace: default
spec: {}

api_discovery.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: api_discovery
metadata:
  name: example-discovery
  namespace: default
spec:
  user_defined_api_discovery_policy: {}

rate_limiter_policy.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: rate_limiter_policy
metadata:
  name: example-rl
  namespace: default
spec:
  burst_size: 1
  committed_information_rate: 1

waf_exclusion_policy.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: waf_exclusion_policy
metadata:
  name: example-waf-exclusion
  namespace: default
spec:
  waf_exclusion_rules:
    - metadata:
        name: exclude-health
      exact_path: "/health"

user_identification.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: user_identification
metadata:
  name: example-user-id
  namespace: default
spec:
  rules:
    - client_ip: {}

malicious_user_mitigation.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: malicious_user_mitigation
metadata:
  name: example-mitigation
  namespace: default
spec: {}

sensitive_data_policy.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: sensitive_data_policy
metadata:
  name: example-sensitive-data
  namespace: default
spec: {}

protocol_inspection.example_yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: protocol_inspection
metadata:
  name: example-inspection
  namespace: default
spec:
  enable_disable_compliance_checks:
    disable_compliance_checks: {}
  enable_disable_signatures:
    enable_signature: {}

global_log_receiver.example_yaml:
metadata:
  name: my-log-receiver
  namespace: system
spec:
  request_logs: {}
  http_receiver:
    uri: http://logs.example.com/ingest

alert_receiver.example_yaml:
metadata:
  name: my-alert-receiver
  namespace: system
spec:
  email:
    email_address: alerts@example.com

virtual_site.example_yaml:
metadata:
  name: my-virtual-site
  namespace: default
spec:
  site_type: REGIONAL_EDGE
  site_selector:
    expressions:
      - "ves.io/siteName=any"
